Lead Generation.Action: Use Ahrefs or Ubersuggest to find 5 long-tail keywords with intent signals (e.g., 'hire management consultant Orlando'). Add to title tags and H1s on service pages.
Identify 3 business or entrepreneurship blogs with DA > 40 using Ahrefs. Send a personalized pitch offering a guest article on operational efficiency or leadership.
Update GBP with primary keyword in business description, add 3 new service photos, and post a 150-word update linking to a recent case study or blog.
Write a 600-word case study targeting the keyword '[Industry] consulting results [City]'. Structure with Problem → Solution → Outcome. Publish to blog and share on LinkedIn.

Brand Awareness.Action: Write or repurpose a 500-word LinkedIn article on a trend in your industry (e.g., 'Why SMBs Are Failing at Operational Efficiency in 2026'). Include 2 internal links.
Submit or verify NAP (Name, Address, Phone) consistency on 5 local directories: Yelp, Clutch, Expertise.com, Bark.com, and local Chamber of Commerce site.
Brand Awareness.EstimatedImpact: +10% local SEO ranking signals in 45 days

Brand Awareness.Action: Send a review request email to 5 past clients using a templated ask. Respond publicly to all existing reviews (positive and negative) within 24 hours.
Brand Awareness.EstimatedImpact: +8% click-through rate from Google Maps in 30 days

Brand Awareness.Action: Review top 5 service/landing pages. Add 2 internal links per page pointing to blog posts or case studies. Use keyword-rich anchor text aligned to target queries.

Retention & Authority.Action: Interview or compile results from a current retainer client. Publish a 400-word success story with metrics. Tag the client on LinkedIn and request a share.
Add LocalBusiness and Service schema markup to homepage and top 2 service pages using Google's Structured Data Markup Helper. Validate with Rich Results Test.
Retention & Authority.Tool: Google Structured Data Markup Helper / Yoast SEO

Retention & Authority.Action: Take the last client newsletter or update and repurpose as a 350-word blog post. Optimize for one target keyword. Submit URL to Google Search Console for indexing.

Lead Generation.TaskName: Optimize Product Landing Page for Intent Keywords
Lead Generation.Action: Run landing page through Surfer SEO. Add 3 high-intent keywords (e.g., '[Product] alternative', 'best [category] software 2026') to H1, meta, and first paragraph.
List or update product on G2, Capterra, and Product Hunt. Ensure description uses top 3 target keywords. Request 3 reviews from current users.

Brand Awareness.Action: Post a technical tip, tutorial snippet, or tool comparison to Dev.to, Hashnode, or a relevant Reddit community. Include a non-promotional mention of your product.

Lead Generation.Action: Create or update a location-specific landing page targeting '[City] [Property Type] for sale/rent'. Include local stats, a map embed, and 3 internal links.

Brand Awareness.Action: Upload a property or market update video to YouTube. Optimize title, description, and tags with target keywords. Embed on relevant blog or listing page.

Lead Generation.Action: Run a keyword gap report vs. top 2 competitors using SEMrush or Ubersuggest. Identify 5 easy-win keywords (KD < 30, volume > 100). Add to content calendar.

Brand Awareness.Action: Open GSC Performance report. Find 5 queries ranking positions 8-15. Update the corresponding page title, meta description, and H2 to better match the query.
